seoTitle: Bilbul vs Bilgola Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bilbul and Bilgola Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bilbul vs Bilgola Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bilbul and Bilgola Beach.
heading: Bilbul vs Bilgola Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bilbul, New South Wales and Bilgola Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bilbul has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Bilgola Beach (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bilbul or Bilgola Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bilbul has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Bilgola Beach scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bilbul scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Bilgola Beach scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bilbul or Bilgola Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bilbul has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
